name: ImageOps
description: Image context injection and endpoint-backed image generation/edit tools.
routing_hint: Enable for image understanding or image deliverable tasks.

capabilities.name: inject_image_context
capabilities.description: Load a picture into session memory when it is NOT already visible to you as an image_url in this conversation (e.g. not covered by delegation attachments). Do NOT call if the same image is already present as image_url above. Path text in the task alone is not enough reason to inject.

input_ref.description: Exactly one of `file_path` | `file_id` | `url` (same schema as `generate_or_edit_image`). Prefer `file_path` for files on disk (`/abs/path`). `file:///abs/path` is accepted and normalized server-side. `file_id` = upload id `file_`+hex only (not `imgu_...`). `url` = `data:image/...;base64,...` or `http(s)://` image URL (server downloads, size-capped).

file_path.description: Absolute path `/...` readable on server. `file:///...` is normalized automatically; plain `/...` is preferred in prompts.

file_id.description: Session upload id: `file_` plus hex from send_file/list_session_files. Not `imgu_...` or other chat handles.

url.description: `data:image/...;base64,...` or `http(s)://` URL whose body is an image.

capabilities.name: generate_or_edit_image
capabilities.description: Call configured image_generation endpoint profile to generate/edit an image from prompt plus optional input image, then write the output file.

input_ref.description: Optional. When an input image is required: exactly one of `file_path` | `file_id` | `url` (same schema as `inject_image_context`). Prefer `file_path` for files on disk (`/abs/path`). `file:///abs/path` is normalized server-side. `file_id` = `file_`+hex only. `url` = data URL or `http(s)://` image fetch.

file_path.description: Absolute path `/...` readable on server. `file:///...` is normalized automatically; plain `/...` is preferred in prompts.

file_id.description: Session upload id: `file_` plus hex from send_file/list_session_files. Not `imgu_...` or other chat handles.

url.description: `data:image/...;base64,...` or `http(s)://` URL whose body is an image.

profile_name.description: LLM profile name for image generation/editing endpoint.

size.description: Optional image size hint for endpoint.
